name: Saucy Thai Beef Noodles
intro: This dish has been a family favorite for a long time. I like to double the recipe and add extra veggies

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced beef top sirloin steak

method: Add the milk, creamy peanut butter, soy sauce, brown sugar, sherry, garlic cloves, crushed red pepper flakes, and hot pepper sauce into a small saucepan. Let it boil, stirring constantly. When it starts boiling, turn off the heat.
Cook pasta according to package directions.
Heat ½ teaspoon of oil in a large wok or sauté pan, then fry the beef until it is not pink. When done, remove the beef from the pan.
In the same pan, heat the remaining oil, then fry the carrots and red chilies for 3-4 minutes.
Stir-fry the snow peas and onions for another 2-3 minutes. Return the beef (Step 3) to the pan.
Drain the pasta (Step 2), then place it in the pan.
